flavorText: Privateers are lawful raiders, officers, and banner-bearers who turn crew coordination into battlefield advantage.

features.description: Bring authority and legitimacy to your pressure, whether in combat or tense negotiations.
Spend swagger to reposition allies or steady their nerves under fire.
Coordinate clean pressure from a crew that listens when you bark an order.
Turn choke points and organized defense into a weapon.
At your highest tier, your commands can decide the tone of the whole encounter.

privateer-letters-of-marque.summary: Project authority in social scenes and structured conflicts.

privateer-command-presence.summary: Use Swagger Dice to support allies with movement, confidence, or cleaner attacks.
privateer-command-presence.description: This is the leadership subclass. It should feel like the Pirate who shouts one line and the whole fight sharpens around it.

privateer-ordered-volley.summary: Reward coordinated attacks and disciplined pressure.

privateer-hold-the-line.summary: Make doors, rails, and chokepoints easier for your side to own.

privateer-admirals-demand.summary: Command the field like an officer whose presence cannot be ignored.
